single-select coverage + frontmatter-explain reveal (fm-only, no takeaway — must reveal on correct; rao-master-17)
time coverage — was COMPLETELY DEAD until rao-master-11

sequence-build REUSE coverage — palette deliberately smaller than the answer demands, so tiles must COPY on placement (BRIEF-3 Item C exemption; guarded by verify-drag.js). Placed AFTER the 13 positional coverage frames (0-12) so verify-reset's per-behavior drill indices are unshifted; NOT last (ladder fixture must stay last).
explain precedence coverage — markup p.explain beats frontmatter explain (rao-master-17)
equal-groups figure coverage (rao-master-19 Part A) — rings of dots, no count labels
sequence figure coverage (rao-master-19 Part B) — boxed chain with a dashed blank box
option-ladder coverage, SHORT tier (rao-master-19 Part D) — longest option ≤ 10 chars, 4-across grid
option-ladder coverage, MEDIUM tier (rao-master-19 Part D) — longest option 11-18 chars, 2×2 grid
option-ladder coverage, LONG tier (rao-master-19 Part D) — longest option > 18 chars, one full-width row per option
RENDER-1 fixtures C1+C2 — a 5-mark column must read as 5 discrete countable ✕s (never a solid block), and the source table must sit BESIDE the plot at desktop, stacked at phone width

RENDER-1 C3 fixture — per-digit product boxes must keep a visible gap between columns AND stay x-centre-aligned with the digit columns above (place-value columns must never fuse into one segmented box)

RENDER-1 C4 fixture — thousands comma must render understated (smaller, lighter, muted vs digits) in a narrow column, and digit columns must stay x-centre-aligned across all rows including rows that carry a blank

RENDER-1 C5 fixture — two same-area rectangles at ONE shared scale; the authored 300px figure must render at its authored size (never upscaled to dominate the card), and the rendered width ratio must equal the dimension ratio
in-out layout coverage — two-column In/Out rule table (BRIEF-1 Item C); MUST NOT be last — verify-touch needs the ladder question as the final card
